title: DragonMineNetwork
description: The official modpack for DragonMineNetwork, a Dragon Ball-themed Minecraft server.
body:
**DragonMineNetwork** is a custom modpack created for an action-packed Dragon Ball-themed Minecraft server.
Built around the **DragonMine Z** mod, this pack introduces custom systems using **CustomNPCs** to bring players unique training mechanics, custom quests, interactive menus, and dynamic gameplay features.

🌐 Server IP: mc.dragonminenetwork.com or mc.dragonmine.network

💬 Discord: [Click Here](https://discord.com/invite/jhVRmDSCNc)



Note: This modpack is designed specifically for the DragonMineNetwork server.
You can use it for your singleplayer world too, but you will not have all the special content made only for the server; so join us online for the full experience!
